events.event_description: First U.S. Ambassador to Samoa, Kenneth Franzheim, presented credentials, establishing ambassadorial-level relations.

evidence.quote: Kenneth Franzheim, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1971-02-10. Credentials presented: 1971-07-14. Left Apia 1972-11-11.

events.event_description: Embassy Apia was formally established, elevating the mission from a nonresident ambassadorship to a resident embassy, with William P. Francisco III as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Note: During Cleveland's tenure as non-resident Ambassador, Embassy Apia was established on November 15, 1988, with William P. Francisco III as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
